commands.review_summary:
The branch removes public skill `updatedAt` writes from scan-driven moderation refresh paths, adds LLM scan regression tests for manual-override cases, and reformats the autoreview skill proof table.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main scanner moderation paths write `updatedAt` during scan refreshes, while the documented public `updated` sort is supposed to reflect republishing. I did not run the runtime path because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Keep this open for maintainer review and contributor runtime proof; no narrow automation repair is needed after the scoped second commit.

target.title: fix: preserve skill updated timestamp on scans
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep scanner/moderation refreshes from bumping the public skill `updatedAt` timestamp
- Preserve scanner moderation sync behavior while stripping `updatedAt` from manual-override-preserved scan patches
- Add regression coverage for normal LLM scan sync and manual-override-preserved LLM scan sync

## Tests

- `bun run test convex/skills.manualOverrides.test.ts convex/lib/manualOverrides.test.ts`
- `bun run lint`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
